authority_boundary: Curated public evidence-strength registry consumed by the Microcosm runtime authority and spine projections. It classifies what each organ proves; it does not authorize release, provider calls, private-data equivalence, or source mutation.

external_subprocess_witness.claim_ceiling: tool witness only, not general proof authority

algorithmic_projection.claim_ceiling: projection mechanics only, not domain correctness

fixture_echo_smoke.claim_ceiling: smoke/projection demo only, not behavioral or safety validation

organ_evidence_classes.classification_basis: derived public contract checks over substrate bundle structure, authority handles, and negative cases
